text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Geez... What's going on here? I haven't had a
single bite.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, maybe I should try heading a little farther
upriver.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm definitely gonna catch something now.
Just you wait, lil' fishies.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahh, it ate the bait right off the hook...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, some days just pan out this way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They do say you've gotta be patient and take
your time if you wanna reel in a whopper.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Besides, fishing's just a pastime anyway...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Fish do whatever the heck they feel like. And
sometimes none of them feel like biting.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I have to catch at least one! I won't give up
till I've caught something!

And this is how Seiun Sky ends up missing her
training.
